title: Frequently Asked Questions for Registered International Students
content:
Frequently Asked Questions for Registered International Students

Where can I get detailed information about Üsküdar University?

You can reach us at +90 216 400 22 83 from our Whatsapp number or send us an e-mail to

international@uskudar.edu.tr.

You may also contact us by filling in the "Do you like to study in Üsküdar?" on our International Relations website.

From which site can I apply?

What are the documents required for the application?

How does the application process work?

What are the documents required for registration?

How can I pay my education fee?

What payment options are available to make payments?

In which languages do you offer education?

How can I be exempt from language exams?

When/where does the proficiency exam take place?

What are the accommodation options for students coming from abroad?

What are the on-campus transportation facilities?

Is assistance offered with student visa and residence permit processes?

Do students have the chance to participate in study abroad and exchange programs?

What payment options are available to make payments?
